values.description: CaseXchange backend base URL. Use localhost for local dev; switch env for QA/UAT/production.
Public API base URL — derived from base_url. Do not edit directly.
Internal API base URL — used for auth login and key management.
Public API key (format: cxp_ro_..., cxp_std_..., or cxp_full_...). Populated automatically by key creation requests.
JWT access token for internal API authentication. Populated automatically by the Login request.
Firm UUID. Populated automatically by Get Own Firm or Get Firm Directory. Used in Firms and Routing requests.
Case UUID. Populated automatically by Create Case or List Cases. Used in Cases, Documents, and Medical Referrals requests.
Document UUID. Populated automatically by Upload Document or List Documents.
User UUID. Populated automatically by Invite User or List Users.
Routing rule UUID. Populated automatically by Create Rule or List Rules.
Medical referral UUID. Populated automatically by Create Medical Referral or List Medical Referrals.
Public API key record UUID (not the plaintext key value). Used for Get Key Usage and Revoke API Key requests in Key Management.
Target firm UUID for Network relationship endpoints. Set manually to the partner firm's ID.
Internal login email used for key-management endpoints. Override per environment as needed.
Internal login password used for key-management endpoints. Override per environment as needed.
